search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk NG136 blood pressure device validation maintenance cuff technique home monitoring
site:doh.gov.ae blood pressure measurement standard UAE
candidate_sources_rejected: device manufacturer instructions treated as an independent clinical guideline
automatic medicine adjustment from home readings
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: Manufacturer material is device-specific and not the primary clinical source.
Diagnosis and targets require qualified context.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Adults undergoing clinic or home blood-pressure measurement; pregnancy, children, arrhythmia, severe readings, postural symptoms, and condition-specific targets require tailored pathways.
setting_applicability: Primary-care documentation and follow-up as qualified by the exact source and clinical context.
UAE_applicability: International evidence requires UAE primary-care, laboratory, prescribing, referral, safeguarding, and local-pathway adaptation.
recency_verification: Exact official documents and sections were reviewed on 2026-07-14.
superseded_check: The cited exact source remains current on the issuing organisation website at the review date.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact measurement section supports validated and maintained devices, standardised environment, quiet seated posture, supported arm, suitable cuff, pulse review, and clinician-recorded technique without interpreting blood pressure.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports validated and maintained devices, standardized measurement conditions, appropriate cuff size, pulse review, and clinician-recorded postural measurements.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact clinic, ambulatory, and home-measurement section supports recording measurement source, repeated readings, and home log context without automatically diagnosing hypertension.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting repeated clinic readings, ABPM or HBPM source and averages, result context, annual measurement in relevant diabetes care, and clinician review without automatically diagnosing hypertension.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact monitoring section supports clinician-entered training discussion, home-monitoring review, questions, and arranged follow-up without generating a target or treatment change.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinic, home, or ambulatory blood-pressure monitoring, symptoms, medication and lifestyle discussion, and an annual review without generating targets, treatment, or advice.

unresolved_source_gaps: Device model, validation status, cuff size, technique observed, actual readings, arrhythmia, pregnancy, diagnosis, target, medicine, escalation, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
